how_to_read: All timing summaries are rank statistics over the profiler dense cycle iteration_1 only; iteration_2 files in these runs are profiler flush traces with ~74 events.
Durations are trace event duration sums, not exclusive wall time. Parent and child annotations can overlap; use the mori_routed_vjp_gpu_leaf table for the routed-VJP leaf ladder.
Counts reflect one profiled step with 4 model layers and 16 gradient-accumulation microbatches, so MoE backward leaf counts are normally 64 per rank.
Profiler overhead depresses throughput; use this artifact for attribution, not final performance headline.
